name: claudex
description: 6 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: /harness (adaptive SINGLE/TEAM builder with Sentinel + Auditor, auto mode selection), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + git), /harness-qa (functional + security QA with Playwright), /design (3-dial frontend design), /claude-dashboard (statusline). 25 agent prompts with Mythos-ready containment, Security Triage, Adaptive Scale Protocol.
